heading: Next Steps
body:
Once you've learned how to create embeddings and
query your embeddings with MongoDB Vector Search, start building
generative AI applications by implementing
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG):

- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](avs-rag)

- [Build a Local RAG Implementation with MongoDB Vector Search](local-rag)

You can also quantize your 32-bit float vector
embeddings into fewer bits to further reduce
resource consumption and improve query speed.
To learn more, see [Quantized vectors](avs-quantization).
